calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Philip A. Leider, Esq. for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witness: Sheila Flontoila, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Default Defendant: Karen Wray as follows:
Principal $11,187.00
Costs $584.00 for a total of $11,771.00
Judgment signed in open court.
